_publications._publicationTitle: The loss of Nf1 transiently promotes self-renewal but not tumorigenesis by neural crest stem cells.

_contextSnippet: Western blot demonstrated increased phosphorylated Erk (pErk) in the Nf1−/− colonies, consistent with increased Ras signaling in these cells
details: Increased phosphorylated Erk (pErk) in Nf1-/- colonies, consistent with increased Ras signaling
